overall.description: A first-person exploration of a luxurious indoor Japanese zen garden and shrine area within a corporate building (Arasaka Estate from Cyberpunk 2077). The player walks through a raked sand rock garden, approaches a shrine wall with bronze lion statues and a red corporate banner, ascends a dramatically lit staircase, and emerges onto an upper balcony overlooking the atrium.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor zen rock garden courtyard with raked sand

agents.ego_description: walking around the central rock formation observing the zen garden and surrounding balconies

entered.detail: large dark boulder surrounded by smaller rocks on white raked sand
meticulously raked white sand with circular patterns around the rocks
traditional Japanese stone lanterns emitting warm light
metal railings of the upper level overlooking the courtyard

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a serene indoor zen garden with a large central rock formation surrounded by raked white sand. The camera circles the rock while stone lanterns and upper balcony railings frame the space. The atmosphere is quiet and contemplative with dramatic spotlighting on the rocks.

scene_state.functional_zone: shrine wall with corporate logo and guardian statues

events.description: approaching the illuminated shrine wall with red banner and bronze lion statues

agents.ego_description: walking toward the shrine display with the red Arasaka banner, observing the bronze lion statues flanking the emblem

entered.detail: dark stone wall with checkered pattern serving as backdrop for the shrine display
large red banner with gold circular triple-leaf logo illuminated by spotlight
pair of bronze komainu guardian lion statues flanking the banner
rough textured stone wall along the left side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from the open garden toward a shrine wall featuring a prominent red Arasaka corporate banner flanked by bronze lion statues. The lighting shifts to warmer tones highlighting the shrine display against the dark checkered wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: illuminated wooden staircase with red accent lighting

events.description: beginning to ascend the red-lit wooden staircase toward the upper level

agents.ego_description: climbing the wooden stairs illuminated by red underlighting, moving toward the upper balcony

entered.detail: wooden staircase with dramatic red lighting underneath each step
broad wooden stairs with warm ambient lighting

segments.scene_description: Moving past the shrine, the camera approaches and begins ascending a grand wooden staircase. The stairs feature striking red accent lighting underneath each step, creating a dramatic atmosphere as the camera climbs toward the upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper balcony overlooking the atrium courtyard

events.description: emerging onto upper balcony with panoramic view of the courtyard and shrine below

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper balcony and looking down at the rock garden and shrine wall visible below

entered.detail: wooden walkway with metal railings on the upper level
dark metal safety railings along the balcony edge
large ceiling opening with diffused light filtering down into the atrium

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges onto an upper balcony revealing a breathtaking view of the entire atrium from above. The rock garden and shrine wall with the red banner are visible in the distance below, while a large overhead skylight diffuses soft light into the space. Metal railings line the walkway as the camera moves along the upper level.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a serene indoor zen garden that ascends into a sweeping aerial view of a corporate atrium. It begins by circling a central rock formation amidst raked white sand and stone lanterns under dramatic spotlighting. As the camera moves away from the garden, the scene shifts toward a shrine wall where warmer tones highlight bronze lion statues and a prominent red corporate banner. The perspective then transitions to a grand wooden staircase, climbing upward through a dramatic atmosphere created by red accent lighting beneath each step. Finally, the camera emerges onto an upper balcony, revealing the entire atrium and the garden below beneath a large, soft-lit overhead skylight.
